steps.title: Use the two given points
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,7)$ and $(1,13)$. The point $(0,7)$ gives the $y$-intercept, so $b=7$.

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: The slope is $$m=\frac{13-7}{1-0}=6.$$ With slope $6$ and intercept $7$, the line is $$y=6x+7.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Only choice D, $y=6x+7$, has slope 6 and $y$-intercept 7. Choice D is correct.
